meta.dc:title: 119 HR 1491 ENR: To amend the Internal Revenue Code of 1986 to make the postponement of certain deadlines by reason of disasters applicable to the limitation on credit or refund, and to take postponements into account for purposes of sending collection notices.
meta.dc:creator: United States House of Representatives
meta.dc:rights: Pursuant to Title 17 Section 105 of the United States Code, this file is not subject to copyright protection and is in the public domain.

preface.congress: One Hundred Nineteenth Congress of the United States of America
preface.session: A T T H E F I R S T S E S S I O N
preface.enrolledDateline: Begun and held at the City of Washington on Friday, the third day of January, two thousand and twenty-five

longTitle.officialTitle: To amend the Internal Revenue Code of 1986 to make the postponement of certain deadlines by reason of disasters applicable to the limitation on credit or refund, and to take postponements into account for purposes of sending collection notices.

enactingFormula.i: Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representa­tives of the United States of America in Congress assembled,

section.heading: SHORT TITLE.
section.content: This Act may be cited as the “Disaster Related Extension of Deadlines Act”.

section.heading: POSTPONEMENT OF CERTAIN DEADLINES BY REASON OF DISASTERS MADE APPLICABLE TO LIMITATION ON CREDIT OR REFUND.

subsection.heading: Extension of Time for Filing Return.—

paragraph.heading: In general.—
paragraph.content: Section 7508A of the Internal Revenue Code of 1986 is amended by adding at the end the following new subsection:“(f) Application to Limitation on Credit or Refund.—For purposes of section 6511(b)(2)(A), any period disregarded under this section with respect to the time prescribed for filing any return of tax shall be treated as an extension of time for filing such return.” .

paragraph.heading: Effective date.—
paragraph.content: The amendment made by this subsection shall apply to claims filed after the date of the enactment of this Act.

paragraph.heading: In general.—
paragraph.chapeau: Section 6303(b) of such Code is amended—

subparagraph.content: by striking “Except” and inserting the following:“(1) In general.—Except” , and

by adding at the end the following new paragraph:“(2) Postponement by reason of disaster, significant fire, or terroristic or military actions.—For purposes of paragraph (1), the last date prescribed for payment of any tax shall be determined after taking into account any period disregarded under section 7508A.” .

paragraph.heading: Effective date.—
paragraph.content: The amendments made by this subsection shall apply to notices issued after the date of the enactment of this Act.

signature.role: Speaker of the House of Representatives.
Vice President of the United States and President of the Senate.
